---
id: call

description: "The caller specifies `modName` and `method` in the JSON body, along with"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Proxy `POST /rpc/call` to the MOD service's local HTTP server."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/rpc/call"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



The caller specifies `modName` and `method` in the JSON body, along with
an optional `body` field that is forwarded to the MOD service.

Error codes:
- `503` — MOD not registered (not yet started or crashed)
- `404` — method unknown for this MOD
- `504` — MOD service timed out
- `502` — MOD service refused the connection

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

>
  
</RequestSchema>

>
